CompoundRecord.Primitive:
VA Submission - 

Support for subject's mental health.

Officers have attended a domestic between subject, her mother and sister. Sister being suspect.

Subject states these incidents are frequent and this is really starting to affect her mental health, which she has been struggling with anyway and this is worsening things.

Officers have asked if she has any support at the moment and she states that she doesn't. She recently started antidepressants but doesn't feel like she has anyone to talk to about how she is feeling and the dark thoughts she is having.

Officer has given the subject the crisis team phone number and has asked her permission for this referral which she was grateful for.
This referral, crisis phone number given to subject and suspect arrested so subject has been safeguarded from them

SimpleRecord.Primitive: Subject states she has been having some dark thoughts recently but would not allude to these
feels she has no one to talk to about her mental health issues\n
The subject's living situation is effecting her mental health \n
